questions.question: Consider a graph with nodes A, B, C, and D, where the edges are as follows: A -> B, A -> C, B -> D, and C -> D. Implement an iterative deepening depth-first search algorithm to find a path from A to D. What is the path? (2 marks)
What is the time complexity of the iterative deepening depth-first search algorithm, where the maximum depth of the search is n? (1 mark)

Consider a graph with cycles and multiple paths to the goal node. Implement an iterative deepening depth-first search algorithm to find a path from the start node to the goal node. Describe the conditions under which the algorithm terminates (1 mark)
